elements.original_description: A simple piggy bank tilted sideways with coins spilling out onto a white surface. The piggy bank looks empty and sad, with a small crack on its side. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple piggy bank tilted sideways with a few coins spilling out onto a pure white surface. The piggy bank appears empty and sad, with a small visible crack on its side. Clean flat vector art with high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The mood is somber and depleted, reflecting the theme of retirement savings.
